content: How is this team Early-Game? Would swapping out Tawil for Agrippa be better?

Tawil is not that beginner friendly 
But if u know what ur doing using a bluewill( tawil+ blue realm ) could carry u through a lot of the game

Don't use the selector yet

Early chapters could be done with whatever 
Just wait around n pull on the standard
Use the redemption codes if u haven't
Already used, sadly.
Tawil said hi 2 times. Lol
That's not a bad thing lol!
I know, but Im painfully aware of the current arc 2 meta.
pulling on the moonless banner?
caecus not required
people like to use him with tawil, but the blue unit can be anything
as long as u have another source of vulnerable
or just get vulnerable from tawil exalt lol
I did a few and got Lily ("oshi" pick) and an off-banner. EDIT: <@1489884219067858954>

Lucky u I guess lol
I had an account where I went hamlen+3 / myriam e3/ 24 e1
Without seeing a singular tawil

Gacha is a harsh mistress. I like Tawil too, so its not that bad. XD

EDIT: Its just Im painfully aware of what happens when late game comes around.

A general question about team building:

Guides often speak of keyflare, vulnerable and weakness... but curently I find that permanent STR stacking is also a quite big important factor.
Many attack skill aren't very impressing until you get a good amount of STR to back them up, after all.

Is it just the way my team is, or is it true for every team?

If you don't have keyflare on your team, it will not work as well as it would even if you had four characters who build strength. Similarly, if your team does not have Vulnerable, you will miss kills, and if you do not have Weakness, you will die, no questions asked. 

Some teams can use STR stacking more than others, and you can end up in a situation where you're dying because you're overly reliant on STR and don't generate any, but it's far less common than missing the other three.
str is important on characters that benifit from it 🤯
most characters have their own scalling in their kits
That a hole in my knowledge then... what kind of team have no character really beneifiting sTR ?
the one that comes to mind is pollux
Pollux Castor don't care about str
but is more like, you get more dmg obv, but its whatever since their kits dont get a str multiplier
mouchette for example, you just build dr
gmurphy spam 3 cost
poison teams
Tentacle damage teams do benefit from strength scaling since strength goes into tentacle damage, but those teams in turn generate the tentacle damage directly, so...
you have to scale in fights, but if your dps is not ghelot dore or kath, str is less important
daff too i think?
Some characters feel more reliant on it but that's because those characters are bad (Aurita) and do no damage to begin with, so the *only* damage they have comes from the strength you built
we are talking about real dmg dealers here <:Doll_Wait:1468259092459032606>
Ok, so it's more relevant on teams where the DPS use card which gets like  "x4 Str" on it ?
Basically every DPS has a form of that so that's not really cut and dry either, it's just better to remember those three
Unless you're playing a character with extra strength scaling or a big amount of multihits, strength is a really inefficient way of scaling your damage

Characters who gain extra benefit from strength are typically characters who don't arbitrarily have multihits. For example, GMurphy hits five times with her DPS card, so she doesn't need a multiplier.
x15 str multiplier <:24_Clown:1468259444423921871>
even for characters that scale with str a lot, dmg multiplier is usually more efficient
the only character that is good at stacking str is clementine
and doresain i guess
https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1170692781216378960/1429523004215398410/heart-locket.gif
We're swinging for several thousand damage at lv60, +12 strength isn't moving the needle a lot, and +12 perm STR is a fucking lot
if u have neither of those then str generation is not worth a team slot
*support
Temporary strength is superior anyway <:Catsiah:1441868724226228265>
using dore as a support is trolling
wdym, doresain is always used as support for pickman carry <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
"good" sources of temp str?
Anything that consistently gets you over 600 in one turn
thats why im asking
ogier aa <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
pickman

Pickman obviously, AA Ogier, Obsession Eternal, Goliath if you have tentacle damage for him, Casiah with Kath's wheel
Maybe Erica if you try hard enough?
casiah with kath wheel is just kath wheel
so pickman and the posse
Kath's wheel gives you like 300 at most, if you put it on a character with high attack
Assuming you can use 5 of their cards
And actually utilize that strength afterwards
i tried tawheel casiah once and got like 500 str
but that was with a lot of telekinesis abuse lol
casiah oe as well
whale game <:Doll_Wait:1468259092459032606>
Show Horla's stance, cheater <:ramona_breakinto:1468258544452370483>
"Cheater"
its on fear
See, see!!
otherwise is 74
without clem is 65
So my calculations are correct
Who would have known,  the 35% base damage on kath wheel is huge for kath
kath wheel good on kath??? <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
its kind of big, i notice a lot more the difference in early turns
Yea cause its a seperate modifier
how the increase would be with 10 combust?
i know its a separate modifier but im bad at math
Let's say you have 0 str
100 base damage
ok
10 combustion = 10 flammia transfered = 50% base damage boost
So its at 150
With kath wheel, you × it by 1.35
Which is like
53 more damage
203 now
If you consider the temp str
Then you need to factor in the str scaling of combustion on hyperflare
does the 50% more base dmg on hyperflare interact with this?
Now that's a good question,  I think it would be seperate modifier as well
Need to test
good luck testing that 💀
Now the question is do you actually run her wheel over something like tawil wheel
yes?
her wheel is the best dmg option
the problem is always the crit rate
otherwise i would consider running pollux wheel with kath for mine
but i lack crit rate
Tinct i guess
But will be tough for mono kath
do you know if the base dmg its multiplicative or additive between wheels?
I can test
Its additive between wheels
thanks god
does this mean that Kath wheel is considered as the third bucket in the damage formula guide, just before vulnerable is applied to the formula?
or like there's another bucket between the bucket of base damage and damage amp, just before the str bucket
Its still before damage amp is applied
ahhhh I see
Is that something I should just keep pulling on her banner or is there another way?
theres a bunch of base dmg multipliers that are separate
team base dmg is different from awakener base dmg which is different from command card base dmg
If there's something you want on a solo banner, pull
how do you determine if an awakener has a high base damage , similar to  Ghelot and Kath? Is it just by looking at the atk stat?
look at the skills
ghelot and kath scale base off of base dmg
they both have base dmg multiplier that stacks indefinitely
so base dmg is a significant % of the damage
stats are actually the worst and most misleading number to look at
u can have high atk stat and still deal no damage
ahh I see, I was looking at the cards of Kath and Solarflare's the one I saw there is a base damage scaling.
24 with the highest attack <:24_Clown:1468259444423921871>
the infinite scaling of her base damage is on her E3
ah so is that why damage amp benefits Kath so much?
yes
because base gets multiplied to damage amp
she is one of the few awakeners that can use dmg amp relics
there are like 3 dmg amp relics
